ocr_findings.description: Public-key encryption flow diagram (太郎/花子/次郎 scenario with OX△□ ciphertext arrows) replaced by 'img-0.jpeg' placeholder. Diagram labels and flow arrows not captured in text, but the surrounding prose explains the same content.

reviewer_notes: Page 15-04 公開鍵暗号方式の欠点 and ハイブリッド暗号方式 sidebar. All body text including なりすまし explanation, exam-tip bullet points, and hybrid encryption detail is accurately captured. Diagram loss is expected and acceptable; prose compensates.
